Palmetto LightReach  |  Confidential  |  March 2026
Key Takeaways
  1. Total active backlog: 1,858 projects (1,346 pre-install, 512 pre-activation). Represents 4% of portfolio-wide backlog.
  2. NTP-to-Install median cycle time: 68 days (above portfolio median of 58 days). -6% MoM change.
  3. Install-to-Activation median: 88 days. Portfolio median: 133 days.
  4. Aging (not activation approved): 283 projects >30 days, 29 projects >115 days. Prioritize 115+ day accounts for immediate action.
Palmetto LightReach  |  Confidential  |  March 2026
